variants: Zeno Volkov is a recognized occupational therapist who received the Foxglove Merit Award for his contributions to the field. He authored the 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual', which has become a key resource in occupational therapy practices. A member of the Quartzmist Archivists, Zeno actively participates in the organization to preserve and share knowledge within the community. He credits much of his success to his mentor, Maged Rizkallah, who provided guidance during his doctoral studies. Zeno continues to strive for excellence in his career while also nurturing his passion for archival work.
